Code fragment: public final TableField<BookRecord, Integer> ID = createField(DSL.name("id"), SQLDataType.INTEGER.nullable(false).identity(true), this, "");
Explanation: The primary key column is generically named 'id' instead of a more descriptive name like 'book_id'. Consider renaming the column to 'book_id' to make it self-documenting and avoid ambiguity when joining tables.

Using selectFrom() fetches all columns from the BOOK table, which retrieves unnecessary data and can impact performance. Consider using select() with only the specific columns needed, e.g., dslContext.select(Tables.BOOK.AUTHOR, Tables.BOOK.TITLE).from(Tables.BOOK).
